name: Varenne Valeur A-CHF
summary: Varenne Valeur A-CHF is a value-oriented fund denominated in Swiss Francs (CHF). It invests in undervalued securities. Details beyond this are unavailable.

name: Muzinich Americayield Fund Hedg
summary: Muzinich Americayield Fund Hedg is a fixed-income fund focusing on US high-yield bonds managed by Muzinich & Co., designed to generate income, and the "Hedg" indicates that the fund uses hedging strategies, possibly to mitigate currency risk.
